In Brazil alone, there are hundreds of episodes, but three at least were closely overseen by the armed forces and the Brazilian intelligence and defense systems.

This is what led me to keep up with at least these three events.
Hmm, I'm very excited to talk about all three events.
I want to start with Prado, Operation Prado in 1977, Calares.

A number of injuries that were identified by the physician who assisted these people.

So, that has been fully documented.
Now, part of the reports and accounts of this event and the operation,
I mean, it was a long operation, still remains classified,
But that which has been documented is substantial evidence of the existence of the phenomena,
of the people that were victims of the contact with these unidentified objects,
